description: Address-first flow (Feature 1), Search with instant add-to-cart (Feature 3), and Sub-categories L2 hierarchy (Feature 4). These are all customer browsing experience improvements.
steps: Create apps/web/components/location-prompt.tsx: A modal/drawer component that appears on first visit (check localStorage for 'msm-delivery-location'). Shows a map or pincode input. Uses browser geolocation API. If location is outside delivery radius, shows 'We dont deliver here yet' banner. Saves lat/lng/address to localStorage. Shows delivery ETA estimate based on distance.

Update apps/web/components/header.tsx: Add a compact location indicator showing the saved delivery address (area name or pincode). Clicking it opens the location prompt to change address. Show delivery ETA '15-25 min' next to location.
Update apps/web/app/page.tsx: Import and render LocationPrompt. Show it as a modal on first visit if no saved location exists.

Update apps/web/components/home/home-search.tsx: Add inline add-to-cart button (+ button) next to each search result. Import useCart from cart-provider. Show product price and 'Add' button. When item is already in cart, show quantity controls (-, count, +). Results should show product image thumbnail, name, price, unit, and cart controls.
Create apps/web/app/api/admin/subcategories/route.ts: CRUD API for subcategories (GET list, POST create). Requires admin auth.
Create apps/web/app/api/admin/subcategories/[id]/route.ts: PUT update, DELETE for subcategories.

Update apps/web/app/products/page.tsx: When a category is selected, fetch and display sub-category pills below the category tabs. Clicking a sub-category pill filters products further. Update the getProducts function to accept a subcategory filter.

Create apps/web/components/subcategory-pills.tsx: Horizontal scrollable pill list for sub-categories within a selected category. Client component that fetches subcategories for the selected category and filters products.
acceptance_criteria: Location prompt modal appears on first visit when no saved location exists
Header shows saved location with delivery ETA
Search results have inline add-to-cart buttons with quantity controls
Products page shows sub-category pills when a top-level category is selected
Sub-category CRUD API endpoints exist for admin
verification: cd apps/web && npx next build 2>&1 | tail -20
findings: All 8 steps implemented. LocationPrompt uses browser geolocation with pincode fallback, estimates ETA by distance. Header reads from localStorage with event listeners for updates. HomeSearch now shows product thumbnail, price, unit, and cart controls (add/qty stepper). Subcategory CRUD uses same auth pattern as categories (requireProductStaff). Products page shows SubcategoryPillsServer (async server component that resolves category name to ID then passes subcats to client). Also created a standalone SubcategoryPills client component for other use cases. Public /api/subcategories endpoint for client-side fetching. Build passes cleanly (tsc --noEmit + next build).
